permission_grants_principal_exclusive.name: permission_grants_principal_exclusive
permission_grants_principal_exclusive.value: ("permission_grants"."principal_uid" IS NOT NULL AND "permission_grants"."group_id" IS NULL) OR ("permission_grants"."principal_uid" IS NULL AND "permission_grants"."group_id" IS NOT NULL)

ai_agent_llm_turns_lease_call_index.name: ai_agent_llm_turns_lease_call_index
ai_agent_llm_turns_lease_call_index.where: "ai_agent_llm_turns"."lease_id" IS NOT NULL AND "ai_agent_llm_turns"."call_index" IS NOT NULL

ai_agent_messages_inbound_event_index.name: ai_agent_messages_inbound_event_index
ai_agent_messages_inbound_event_index.where: "ai_agent_messages"."role" in ('user', 'im_ambient') and "ai_agent_messages"."kind" = 'normal' and "ai_agent_messages"."event_source" is not null and "ai_agent_messages"."event_id" is not null

principal_external_identities_provider_i.name: principal_external_identities_provider_identity_index
principal_external_identities_provider_i.where: "principal_external_identities"."provider" IS NOT NULL AND "principal_external_identities"."external_id" IS NOT NULL AND "principal_external_identities"."adapter" IS NULL AND "principal_external_identities"."channel_id" IS NULL

principal_external_identities_channel_ac.name: principal_external_identities_channel_actor_required
principal_external_identities_channel_ac.value: ("principal_external_identities"."kind" <> 'channel_actor') OR ("principal_external_identities"."adapter" IS NOT NULL AND "principal_external_identities"."channel_id" IS NOT NULL AND "principal_external_identities"."external_id" IS NOT NULL)

principal_external_identities_provider_s.name: principal_external_identities_provider_subject_required
principal_external_identities_provider_s.value: ("principal_external_identities"."kind" = 'channel_actor') OR ("principal_external_identities"."provider" IS NOT NULL AND "principal_external_identities"."external_id" IS NOT NULL AND "principal_external_identities"."adapter" IS NULL AND "principal_external_identities"."channel_id" IS NULL)
